messages.content: What does the Premium Plan include?
The Premium Plan includes unlimited camera support, 60-day storage history, advanced AI detection rules, and cellular backup. It is priced at $19.99 per month or $199.99 when billed annually.
How much does it cost annually?
The Premium Plan costs $199.99 when billed annually.
How much does standard shipping take?
Standard Ground Shipping takes 3 to 5 business days for delivery.

tickets.subject: Unable to access billing history
tickets.description: Every time I click on 'Billing History', the app crashes with a 500 error page. Please help.

tickets.subject: Request for custom API integration documentation
tickets.description: We are looking to integrate the customer-support dashboard with our internal logging system. Is there a webhooks specification available?

tickets.subject: Password reset link not arriving
tickets.description: I have requested a password reset link three times but it has not arrived in my inbox or spam folder.
